body.title: Intent extractor — the universal learning substrate
body.summary: The lowest-level learning primitive: a domain-agnostic device (devices/intent/) that every feedback loop eventually wires into. API: predict(context, domain) / validate(prediction_id, actual_outcome) / patterns(domain). Validated predictions are compile targets in every domain — coding, people, projects, calendar — the Radar O'Reilly pattern (anticipate before being asked, built from validated predictions accumulating across domains). V1: store-and-retrieve few-shot; V2: fine-tuning or attractor-based pattern mining once validation count suffices. Ties the dev process to the compiled-inference north star.

key_concepts.name: predict/validate/patterns API
key_concepts.what: domain-agnostic; prediction_id nullable by design (post-hoc ground truth allowed)

key_concepts.name: compile-target framing
key_concepts.what: a validated prediction is a compile target — the bridge to intent-driven compiled inference

key_concepts.name: Librarian exception
key_concepts.what: research produces genuine unknowns; Librarian uses validate(prediction_id=None) only — post-hoc, never pre-hoc (predicting research findings is noise)

body.status_notes: device built; was goal G-intent-extractor (active), seeded by D-intent-extractor-learning-substrate-2026-06-14; goal .md retired into this intention-point.
